name: Steamed Brown Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking soda, salt, and baking powder.
2. Add the corn-meal and graham flour to the sifted ingredients.
3. Combine the sour milk and molasses in a separate bowl.
4. Pour the liquid mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until well combined.
5. Fill 1-pound cans or molds 2/3 full with the batter.
6. Cover the containers tightly and steam for 3 hours.
7. A granular cereal may be substituted for the corn-meal.
